title: urena armitiana var. spenceri
intro: Urena armitiana var. spenceri, also known as Spencer's Urena, is a variety of the Urena armitiana plant, a type of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Spencer's Urena include relief from fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
